_comment: Universal, project-agnostic controlled vocabulary. Project-specific extensions (organisations, systems, extended artefact types, taxonomies) live in project_config.json, not here. setup.py merges the two.

file_classes.STD: Standards, specifications, frameworks and official guidance
file_classes.OPS: Operational documents, forms, reports, emails and source artefacts
file_classes.DAT: Structured data exports, spreadsheets and database extracts
file_classes.API: API specifications, schemas, Postman collections and integration documents
file_classes.IMG: Photographs, scans, screenshots and diagrams captured as images
file_classes.ART: Researcher-created framework artefacts, diagrams, tables and working documents
file_classes.TRN: Meeting transcripts, supervisor notes and interview transcripts
file_classes.VAL: Validation protocols, scenarios, results, walkthroughs and evidence matrices
file_classes.ADM: Research administration, approvals, ethics and candidature documents
file_classes.CODE: Scripts, notebooks, queries and processing pipelines

statuses.EXCLUDED: Retained for audit but excluded from analysis
